# Toddler Labs — LLM Directory

> 115+ free educational activities and browser games for toddlers ages 2-5.
> No ads, no tracking, no accounts. Built by @meimakes.
> https://toddlerlabs.com

## About

Toddler Labs is a single-page directory of:
- 115 hands-on activities organized by developmental category (motor, language, cognitive, sensory, social)
- 10 free educational browser games
- Links to a larger game collection at madladstudios.com

All activities include: age range (2-3), category, skill focus, messiness level, setup time, activity length, materials list.

## Activity Protocols (115 total)

### Motor Skills (24 activities)
1. Cotton Ball Transfer — Fine Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
2. Playdough Exploration — Fine Motor — Medium mess — 2 min setup — 15+ min
3. Paper Tearing and Collage — Fine Motor — Medium mess — 2 min setup — 15+ min
4. Finger Painting — Fine Motor — High mess — 5 min setup — 10 min
5. Sticker/Tape Peeling and Sticking — Fine Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
6. Button Board — Fine Motor — Low mess — 10+ min setup — 10 min
7. Ribbon Pull Box — Fine Motor — Low mess — 10+ min setup — 5 min
8. String Beads — Fine Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
9. Clothespin Drop — Fine Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 5 min
10. Water Transfer with Sponges — Fine Motor — Medium mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
11. Indoor Obstacle Course — Gross Motor — Low mess — 10+ min setup — 15+ min
12. Ball Rolling and Catching — Gross Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
13. Dance Freeze — Gross Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
14. Ribbon Dancing — Gross Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
15. Balloon Tapping — Gross Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min
16. Push and Pull Toys — Gross Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 15+ min
17. Stepping Stones — Gross Motor — Low mess — 5 min setup — 10 min
18. Box Walking — Gross Motor — Low mess — 10 min setup — 10 min
19. Bubble Wrap Stomp — Gross Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 5 min
20. Pillow Mountain Climbing — Gross Motor — Low mess — 5 min setup — 15+ min
21. Cotton Ball Races — Oral Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 5 min
22. Coin Slot Drop — Fine Motor — Low mess — 5 min setup — 5 min
23. Sidewalk Chalk Drawing — Fine Motor — Medium mess — 2 min setup — 15+ min
24. Painting with Water — Fine Motor — Low mess — 2 min setup — 10 min

## Educational Games (10 games)

### From airplanes.games
- Landing Path — Fine Motor + Spatial — Ages 3-5 — https://airplanes.games/landing-path.html
- Takeoff Path — Fine Motor + Spatial — Ages 3-5 — https://airplanes.games/takeoff-path.html
- Pattern Lab — Pattern Recognition — Ages 3-5 — https://airplanes.games/pattern-lab.html
- Logic Hangar — Logical Reasoning — Ages 4-5 — https://airplanes.games/logic-hangar.html
- Flight Path — Problem Solving + Spatial — Ages 3-5 — https://airplanes.games/flight-path.html
- Cargo Count — Counting + 1:1 Correspondence — Ages 3-5 — https://airplanes.games/cargo-count.html

### From Toddler Labs / meimakes
- Tiny Terminal — Keyboard + Cause & Effect — Ages 2-5 — https://tiny-terminal.com
- Word Train — Phonics + Blending — Ages 3-6 — https://meimakes.com/word-train/
- Shapes — Geometry + Vocabulary — Ages 2-4 — https://meimakes.com/shapes/
- Bigger Than Race — Number Sense + Comparison — Ages 3-6 — https://meimakes.com/bigger-than-race/

### Full Game Collection
- 25+ educational browser games — All free, no ads, no accounts — https://madladstudios.com
